case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GUILLERMO LIMON CAMPILLO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUILLERMO LIMON CAMPILLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $456.02 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPILLO, GUILLERMO LIMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-13-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPILLO, GUILLERMO LIMON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPILLO, GUILLERMO LIMON $456.02 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $536.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
